title: MeshMaterial
description: Material specialization for Mesh drawables. Carries the mesh contract conceptually: fixed vertex attribute locations (0 = position, 1 = texcoord, 2 = color), the auto-bound uniforms `u_projection`/`u_translation`/`u_tint`/`u_texture`, and the WGSL group(0)=mesh-uniforms / group(1)=texture / group(2)=user binding scheme. Renderer wiring is added in a later phase.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Carries the mesh contract conceptually: fixed vertex attribute locations (0 = position, 1 = texcoord, 2 = color), the auto-bound uniforms `u_projection`/`u_translation`/`u_tint`/`u_texture`, and the WGSL group(0)=mesh-uniforms / group(1)=texture / group(2)=user binding scheme. Renderer wiring is added in a later phase.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Release GPU resources cached against this material on every backend that has compiled it. Safe to call multiple times. After destroy, the material can still be re-used — renderers recompile on next draw — but typical usage is to drop the reference.

members.name: setTexture
members.signature: setTexture(name: string, texture: Texture | RenderTexture): this
members.description: Bind a named texture. Equivalent to material.textures[name] = texture, returned this for chaining.

members.name: setUniform
members.description: Set a uniform value. Equivalent to material.uniforms[name] = value, returned this for chaining.

members.name: from
members.description: Build a MeshMaterial from an existing ShaderSource. Equivalent to new MeshMaterial({ shader, ...options }).

members.name: from
members.signature: from(glslVertex: string, glslFragment: string, options?: object): MeshMaterial
members.description: Build a MeshMaterial from raw GLSL vertex and fragment source strings. Wraps them in a new ShaderSource; pass options.wgsl to also cover the WebGPU backend.

members.name: blendMode
members.description: Compositing blend mode applied when drawing with this material.

members.name: sampler
members.description: Backend-agnostic sampling state descriptor, or null for the default.

members.name: shader
members.description: GLSL/WGSL source pair backing this material.

members.name: target
members.description: Which drawable class this material can serve; renderers check compatibility.

members.name: textures
members.description: Named texture bindings claimed in addition to the drawable's own texture.

members.name: uniforms
members.description: Mutable user uniform values. Mutate between frames to drive animated effects; the renderer reads from this map every draw. material.uniforms.u_time = performance.now() / 1000; material.uniforms.u_color = [1, 0.5, 0, 1];

members.name: bindKey
members.description: Stable bind key: identical ⇒ same bindings (textures unchanged). Derived from this material's identity and the identities of its bound textures. Changes when a texture is swapped; drives bind-group/slot reuse.

members.name: pipelineKey
members.description: Stable pipeline key: identical ⇒ same GPU pipeline/program can be used. Derived from shader identity, blend mode, and sampler state, and is independent of the owning material instance so identically configured materials share a pipeline. Drives grouping and the pipeline cache.
